output.raw_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Major, s.Age
FROM student s
WHERE s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT h.StuID
    FROM has_pet h
    JOIN pets p ON h.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE p.PetType = '[REDACTED_LITERAL]'
)
LIMIT 100
